nasb.text: And it happened at that time that she fell sick and died; and when they had washed her body, they laid it in an upper room.

esv.text: In those days she became ill and died, and when they had washed her, they laid her in an upper room.

cnv.text: 那時，她因病死了；有人把她洗淨了，停放在樓上。

ccb.text: 当时，她患病死了。有人将她的尸体洗干净后，停放在楼上。

csbs.text: 就在那些日子里，她患病死了。人们清洗了遗体，就放在楼上的房间。
